name: marketplace-mcp
description: MCP server for NOSTR marketplace publishing. Two dialects in one server: NIP-15 stalls + products (kind:30017/30018) for NIP-15-native clients, AND Shopstr-modern shop profile + NIP-99 classified listings (kind:30019/30402) with automatic Shopstr cache-POST so the events surface on shopstr.store. Built on NDK; nsec or NIP-46 signer.
author: LLMOps.Pro <https://njump.me/npub1hdg932jvwc3jdvkqywgqv0ue4nn60exrf92asy8mtazt3hjg7d2s2yw0nw>
